parameters.query:
WITH deleted_rows AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.messages m
  USING gnote.topics t
  WHERE m.topic_id = t.id
    AND t.user_id = m.user_id
    AND LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages'
    AND m.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    AND m.deleted_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  RETURNING
    m.id,
    m.user_id,
    m.topic_id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.deleted_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name
)

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS permanently_deleted_count,
  NOW() AS purge_executed_at
FROM deleted_rows;

WITH settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.session_ttl_days'
      ),
      7
    ) AS ttl_days
),

deleted_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING settings s
  WHERE ss.created_at < NOW() - (s.ttl_days || ' days')::INTERVAL
  RETURNING ss.id
)

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS deleted_search_sessions
FROM deleted_sessions;
